Drew (Hastings).note: Pitched in 2026 opener vs Blind Brook. Part of 2025 Section 1 Class B finalist team.

Ryan Lockwood (Ardsley).note: Featured in scrimmage post vs DF (Mar 19).

Ryan Gentry (Tuckahoe).note: Announced Mar 22 via @tuckahoevarsitybaseball. Part of 3x Section 1 Class C championship team.

Connor Brice (Tuckahoe).note: Signed D1 with Villanova for baseball. Two-sport athlete. Struck out 14 in 2025 Section 1 Class C championship Game 1 vs Haldane.

Patrick Shields (Haldane).note: Tagged in 2025 sectional playoff post vs Tuckahoe.

Lughan McIlwaine (Haldane).note: 4.1 IP, 0 R, 2 H, 6 K in 2026 opener vs Peekskill (W 10-0). Also pitched in relief. Freshman starter — rare for Class B.

Theo Swan (Haldane).note: 5 RBIs including bases-clearing double vs Peekskill in 2026 opener. Ninth grader making immediate varsity impact.

Oliver Herman (Haldane).note: Relief appearance in 2026 opener vs Peekskill. Part of young pitching staff.

Lincoln McCarthy (Haldane).note: Only senior on Haldane's 2026 roster. Key leadership presence on very young team.

Jack Pastor (Blind Brook).note: Double with 2 RBIs in 14-2 W vs Saunders (2024-25). Went 2-2 with 2 SB vs Pleasantville. Returning impact bat.

Nico Palacios (Blind Brook).note: Senior on 2026 Blind Brook roster per MaxPreps.

Elliott Zwicker (Blind Brook).note: Senior on 2026 Blind Brook roster per MaxPreps.

Colin Kelley (Rye Neck).note: Senior captain, pitcher/CF. Named to Section 1 All-Section team. Multi-sport varsity athlete. Key arm on 3-1 Rye Neck squad.

Eddie Major (Edgemont).note: On 2026 Edgemont varsity roster per MaxPreps. Lost 1-5 to DF on Apr 7.

Ari Malz (Edgemont).note: On 2026 Edgemont varsity roster per MaxPreps.

Seth Waxler (Edgemont).note: On 2026 Edgemont varsity roster per MaxPreps.

Charlie Farbman (Sleepy Hollow).note: On Sleepy Hollow roster per MaxPreps. Team beat DF 18-1 on Apr 8.

Fernando Lemus (Sleepy Hollow).note: On Sleepy Hollow roster per MaxPreps.

newsLog.text: DF loses 10-11 to Pearl River at Pearl River HS. Game was NOT postponed as earlier reported. DJ Kollar 2-4, 2B, 3 RBI. Rommel Eusebio 2-2, 2B, 2 RBI. DF now 3-2.

RE-CORRECTION: Irvington vs Sleepy Hollow Mar 26 — IRVINGTON won 9-8 (not SH as previously corrected). Both Irvington DS (W 9-8) and Sleepy Hollow DS (L 8-9) now agree. Previous correction on Mar 30 was based on ambiguous data that has since been clarified.
newsLog.source: Irvington HS DigitalSports, Sleepy Hollow HS DigitalSports (Apr 13 re-check)

newsLog.text: Daily sweep PARTIAL. CRITICAL: @dfeaglesbaseball confirms DF L 10-11 vs Pearl River (Apr 11) — DF now 3-2. DS not showing this game yet. All 15 DS teams swept. RE-CORRECTION: Irvington-SH Mar 26 game confirmed as Irvington W 9-8 (both DS pages agree, reversing earlier correction). New opponent results: BB 4-2 (3 new Ws), Hastings 1-5 (2 new Ls), Irvington 3-2 (2 new games), SH 4-3 (new W), Ardsley 0-4 (new L), Edgemont 0-6 (2 new Ls), Haldane 1-4 (new L). Box scores added for Pearl River game (Kollar 2-4 3RBI, Eusebio 2-2 2RBI). Skipped: Section One, DFSD, IG JV/Diamond Club, some opponent IG handles.
Daily run. No new scores since Apr 4. DF at Edgemont today 4:30 PM (result pending). MaxPreps confirms upcoming schedule. DigitalSports endpoints 404; cross-checked via MaxPreps and web search.
Apr 11 (Sat) Pearl River games POSTPONED — both Varsity (away at Pearl River HS) and JV (home vs Pearl River JV) removed from DFSD athletic calendar. No makeup date posted yet.
Apr 13 Irvington game corrected: changed from Away at Memorial Field to Home at Gould Park per DigitalSports official schedule.

Second daily run. No new games since earlier update. All records confirmed: DF 2-0, Edgemont 0-2, Hastings 1-2, Sleepy Hollow 2-2, Haldane 1-1, Rye Neck 3-0, Ardsley 0-2+, Tuckahoe 0-0, Leffell 0-0. Game today: Sleepy Hollow vs Haldane at 4:30 PM (two DF opponents face off). DF next: Apr 7 at Edgemont 4:30 PM.

newsLog.text: MAJOR CORRECTION: Division B league corrected to 6 teams per MaxPreps: Dobbs Ferry, Blind Brook, Hastings, Rye Neck, Leffell School, Tuckahoe. Removed Ardsley (their league is Edgemont/Pelham/Bronxville) and Valhalla (not in Division B). Removed Westlake-Hastings from divisionB array (Westlake not in Div B). Reclassified DF vs Valhalla Apr 27 as non-league.

newsLog.text: No new DF games (still 2-0). No new opponent results since Apr 4. DF DigitalSports confirms 2-0 overall, 2-0 conf. Sleepy Hollow confirmed 2-2 (L2). Ardsley confirmed 0-2 at JJCR today. Hastings still 1-2. No Gmail schedule alerts. Instagram text extraction limited. All existing scores cross-referenced and confirmed. DF next: Apr 7 at Edgemont.

Hastings at Disney World spring trip. Played Pelham at Disney Stadium (non-league). Score not yet posted.
